name: Chelsea Peretti
bio: Chelsea Peretti is an American comedian, actress, and writer who played Gina Linetti on Brooklyn Nine-Nine and wrote for shows including Parks and Recreation and Kroll Show. Her 2014 Netflix special One of the Greats is a self-aware, surreal take on the stand-up format, full of meta gags and absurd flourishes. She came up in the New York and Los Angeles alternative comedy scenes.

timeline.ev: Begins playing Gina Linetti on Brooklyn Nine-Nine
Netflix special One of the Greats
Writes and directs the film First Time Female Director

accolades: Series regular as Gina Linetti on Brooklyn Nine-Nine
Writer for Parks and Recreation, Saturday Night Live, and Kroll Show

bits.t: Don't Try to Hug Chelsea Peretti
Never Wants to Leave Her House
